mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 149 > npcs > Basic Tool Kit: This contains variety of simple
mechanics.excerpt: Basic Tool Kit: This contains variety of simple tools and fittings commonly used repairs and construction projects. This kit also includes tool belt/vest combination with enough hooks and compartments t0 hold all of the included tools and supplies. character performing any Technician Skill needs such kit to avoid Lack of Proper Equipment Modifier Certain large jobs will require repair kit at the gamemaster $ discretion.
